reason: Multi-unit drag-to-form-up is a player drag gesture (right-drag a flank line across several selected units, splitting it into per-unit slices by equal depth / equal width). The bundled auto-battle replays carry no player orders, so they can't show it, and a tailored clip needs a hand-recorded replay of the gesture. The distribution math, ordering, the on-the-fly cycle hotkey, and the settings default are all pinned by the SelectionManager unit tests instead; a recorded scenario clip is a good demo-recording follow-up.
